title: 猫咪做饭记
style_anchor: cinematic quality, photorealistic, high detail fur, subsurface scattering, warm natural lighting
character_description: an anthropomorphic fluffy orange tabby cat wearing a casual dark vest over a white shirt

shots.prompt: Cinematic wide shot: {character} walks confidently into a bustling outdoor vegetable market, morning sunlight streaming through canvas awnings, vendors and colorful produce visible in background
Medium close-up shot: {character} stands at a wooden vegetable stall, carefully picks up a fresh shiny red tomato with its paw, examining it with interest, soft natural light
Over-the-shoulder shot: {character} points an excited paw at a fresh whole fish displayed on crushed ice at a seafood counter, vendor smiling in background
Tracking shot from side view: {character} walks along a tree-lined cobblestone street carrying brown paper grocery bags, afternoon sunlight casting long shadows, content expression
Eye-level shot: Inside a bright modern kitchen, {character} stands at a stainless steel sink washing green vegetables under running water, natural window light, clean countertops
Top-down close-up shot: Focus on a wooden cutting board, {character} paws hold a small knife precisely chopping colorful vegetables into even pieces, ingredients neatly arranged
Low angle shot: {character} stands by a gas stove stirring ingredients vigorously in a hot wok, steam and aromatic vapors rising dramatically, warm kitchen lighting from above
Medium shot: {character} carefully places a beautifully arranged colorful steaming dish onto a rustic wooden dining table, garnish visible, proud expression
Extreme close-up: {character} sits at the dining table, takes a bite of the prepared food, chews slowly with eyes closing in satisfaction, warm ambient lighting
